title: Verify remind-me-clicked event fires with correct page source attribute
description: Test that analytics tracks correct source when user enables reminder
preconditions: User is on Trial Corner or pause/cancel popup

steps.description: 1. Enable Remind Me toggle from different entry points (Trial Corner, pause popup, cancel popup)
2. Check analytics event payload for each source

expected_result: Event 'remind-me-clicked' fires with correct page source attribute (trial corner, pause pop-up, cancel pop-up)
